# Convertify — Complete Reference

> Convertify (https://convertify.work) is a free, privacy-first online file converter and PDF tool suite. All processing happens client-side in the browser — no files are ever uploaded to any server. No sign-up required, no watermarks, no file size limits, no daily usage caps.

## What Makes Convertify Different

Convertify processes every file directly in your web browser using JavaScript. Unlike most online PDF tools (iLovePDF, Smallpdf, Adobe Acrobat online), your documents are never uploaded to a remote server. This means:

1. **Complete privacy** — sensitive documents like tax forms, contracts, medical records, and legal files stay on your device
2. **No file size limits** — since there is no server upload, there are no restrictions on file size
3. **No account required** — all tools work without sign-up or login
4. **No watermarks** — output files are clean and professional
5. **Works offline** — many tools function without an internet connection after initial page load
6. **Cross-platform** — works on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, and Chromebook via any modern browser

## Tool Categories and Capabilities

### PDF Organization Tools

**Merge PDF** (https://convertify.work/merge-pdf)
Combine 2 or more PDF files into a single document. Drag-and-drop to reorder files before merging. Supports unlimited file count and file size. Common use cases: combining bank statements, assembling legal document sets, merging scanned pages.

**Split PDF** (https://convertify.work/split-pdf)
Extract specific pages from a PDF into one or more separate files. Select individual pages or page ranges. Common use cases: extracting specific chapters, separating invoice pages, pulling individual forms from a packet.

**Compress PDF** (https://convertify.work/compress-pdf)
Reduce PDF file size for email attachments and uploads. Multiple compression levels available. Can compress PDFs to under 100KB, 200KB, 500KB, or 1MB depending on original content. Common use cases: email attachments under size limits, faster uploads to portals, reducing storage space.

**Rotate PDF** (https://convertify.work/rotate-pdf)
Rotate all or selected pages by 90, 180, or 270 degrees. Fix incorrectly scanned documents. Switch between portrait and landscape orientation.

**Delete Pages** (https://convertify.work/delete-pdf-pages)
Remove unwanted pages from a PDF document. Preview pages before deletion. Keep only the pages you need.

**Reorder Pages** (https://convertify.work/reorder-pdf)
Drag and drop to rearrange page order within a PDF. Visual thumbnail preview of each page for easy organization.

**OCR PDF** (https://convertify.work/ocr-pdf)
Optical character recognition to extract searchable text from scanned PDF documents. Makes scanned documents searchable and selectable.

### PDF Conversion — From PDF

**PDF to Word** (https://convertify.work/pdf-to-word)
Convert PDF documents to editable Microsoft Word (.docx) format. Preserves formatting, tables, and images. Common use cases: editing contracts, updating resumes, modifying reports.

**PDF to JPG** (https://convertify.work/pdf-to-jpg)
Convert each page of a PDF to a high-quality JPG image. Adjustable quality settings. Common use cases: sharing pages on social media, embedding in presentations, creating thumbnails.

**PDF to PNG** (https://convertify.work/pdf-to-png)
Convert PDF pages to PNG images with transparency support. Higher quality than JPG for text-heavy documents.

**PDF to Excel** (https://convertify.work/pdf-to-excel)
Extract tables from PDF documents into Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheets. Detects table structures automatically. Common use cases: financial data extraction, converting printed tables to editable spreadsheets.

**PDF to PowerPoint** (https://convertify.work/pdf-to-powerpoint)
Convert PDF slides to editable PowerPoint (.pptx) presentations.

**PDF to Text** (https://convertify.work/pdf-to-text)
Extract all text content from a PDF as plain text (.txt). Useful for search indexing, text analysis, and content extraction.

**PDF to PDF/A** (https://convertify.work/pdf-to-pdfa)
Convert standard PDF to PDF/A archival format for long-term document preservation. Meets compliance requirements for legal and government document archiving.

### PDF Conversion — To PDF

**Word to PDF** (https://convertify.work/word-to-pdf)
Convert Microsoft Word (.doc, .docx) documents to PDF format. Preserves formatting, fonts, and layout.

**JPG to PDF** (https://convertify.work/jpg-to-pdf)
Create a PDF document from one or more JPG images. Supports batch conversion and custom page sizes. Common use cases: creating photo albums, converting scanned documents, compiling image sets.

**PNG to PDF** (https://convertify.work/png-to-pdf)
Create PDF from PNG images with full transparency support.

**Excel to PDF** (https://convertify.work/excel-to-pdf)
Convert Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xls) to PDF format. Preserves table formatting, formulas results, and charts.

**PowerPoint to PDF** (https://convertify.work/powerpoint-to-pdf)
Convert PowerPoint presentations (.ppt, .pptx) to PDF for easy sharing and printing.

**HTML to PDF** (https://convertify.work/html-to-pdf)
Convert web pages and HTML code to PDF documents. Capture full page layouts including CSS styling.

### PDF Editing & Security

**Edit PDF** (https://convertify.work/edit-pdf)
Add text, images, shapes, and annotations directly to PDF documents in your browser.

**Sign PDF** (https://convertify.work/sign-pdf)
Draw, type, or upload your signature and place it on any PDF document. Free electronic signature tool.

**Watermark PDF** (https://convertify.work/watermark-pdf)
Add text or image watermarks to PDF pages. Customize position, opacity, size, and rotation. Common use cases: marking documents as draft, confidential, or adding company branding.

**Protect PDF** (https://convertify.work/protect-pdf)
Add password protection and encryption to PDF files. Set permissions for printing, copying, and editing.

**Unlock PDF** (https://convertify.work/unlock-pdf)
Remove password restrictions from PDF files (requires knowing the password).

**Redact PDF** (https://convertify.work/redact-pdf)
Permanently black out sensitive information in PDF documents. Redacted content cannot be recovered. Common use cases: removing personal information, redacting classified data, FOIA compliance.

**Add Page Numbers** (https://convertify.work/add-page-numbers)
Insert page numbers to PDF documents. Customize position (top/bottom, left/center/right), font, and starting number.

### Image Conversion Tools

**HEIC to JPG** (https://convertify.work/heic-to-jpg)
Convert Apple iPhone HEIC/HEIF photos to universally compatible JPG format. Batch conversion supported. Essential for sharing iPhone photos on non-Apple devices and platforms.

**JPG to PNG** (https://convertify.work/jpg-to-png)
Convert JPG images to PNG format with transparency support. Useful when you need lossless image quality or transparent backgrounds.

**PNG to JPG** (https://convertify.work/png-to-jpg)
Convert PNG images to compressed JPG format. Reduces file size significantly for photos and web images.

**WebP Converter** (https://convertify.work/webp-converter)
Convert images to and from Google's WebP format. WebP offers superior compression for web images. Convert WebP to JPG/PNG for compatibility or JPG/PNG to WebP for faster websites.

**Image Compressor** (https://convertify.work/image-compressor)
Reduce image file sizes without visible quality loss. Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP. Adjustable compression levels. Common use cases: optimizing images for websites, reducing email attachment sizes.

**Resize Image** (https://convertify.work/resize-image)
Resize images to specific pixel dimensions or percentages. Maintain aspect ratio option. Supports batch resizing.

**SVG to PNG** (https://convertify.work/svg-to-png)
Convert scalable vector graphics (SVG) to rasterized PNG images at any resolution. Useful for using vector logos and icons in contexts that don't support SVG.

**BMP to JPG** (https://convertify.work/bmp-to-jpg)
Convert uncompressed BMP bitmap images to compressed JPG format. Dramatically reduces file size.

**GIF to PNG** (https://convertify.work/gif-to-png)
Convert GIF images to PNG format. Extracts the first frame of animated GIFs. PNG provides better quality for static images.

**TIFF to PDF** (https://convertify.work/tiff-to-pdf)
Convert TIFF images (including multi-page TIFF) to PDF documents. Common in scanning and document imaging workflows.

### Developer & Data Tools

**CSV to JSON** (https://convertify.work/csv-to-json)
Convert CSV (comma-separated values) data files to JSON format. Auto-detects delimiters and headers. Useful for API development, data transformation, and importing data into web applications.

**JSON to CSV** (https://convertify.work/json-to-csv)
Convert JSON data to CSV spreadsheet format. Flattens nested objects. Useful for data analysis in Excel/Google Sheets and database imports.

**Markdown to PDF** (https://convertify.work/markdown-to-pdf)
Convert Markdown (.md) documents to professionally formatted PDF files. Supports GitHub-flavored Markdown including tables, code blocks, and task lists.

**XML to JSON** (https://convertify.work/xml-to-json)
Convert XML data to JSON format. Preserves element hierarchy and attributes. Useful for API migration, data transformation, and working with legacy systems.

**Base64 Encoder/Decoder** (https://convertify.work/base64)
Encode files and text to Base64 strings, or decode Base64 back to original format. Supports text and binary files. Common use cases: embedding images in HTML/CSS, API data transfer, email encoding.

**QR Code Generator** (https://convertify.work/qr-code-generator)
Generate QR codes from URLs, plain text, WiFi credentials, contact information, and more. Download as PNG or SVG. Customizable size and error correction level.

### Advanced PDF Tools

**Compare PDF** (https://convertify.work/compare-pdf)
Find differences between two PDF documents. Highlights additions, deletions, and modifications. Useful for reviewing document revisions, legal contract changes, and version control.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is Convertify really free?**
Yes. All tools are 100% free with no hidden fees, no premium tiers, and no usage limits.

**Are my files safe?**
Yes. All processing happens in your browser. Files are never uploaded to any server. Your documents remain on your device at all times.

**Do I need to create an account?**
No. All tools work without registration or sign-in.

**What browsers are supported?**
Convertify works on all modern browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, Opera, and Brave on both desktop and mobile.

**Is there a file size limit?**
No. Since files are processed locally in your browser, there are no file size restrictions imposed by the server.

**Can I use Convertify on my phone?**
Yes. The website is fully responsive and works on iOS and Android browsers. There is also a native Android app available.

## Technical Details

- **Website**: https://convertify.work
- **Framework**: Next.js (React)
- **Processing**: 100% client-side JavaScript (pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, xlsx, heic2any)
- **Privacy model**: Zero-upload architecture — files never leave the browser
- **Deployment**: Vercel edge network
- **Mobile app**: Android (Capacitor)
